title: NouveauSorcier
description: A little magic Modpack for very beginners!
body:
## 📖 Description
This is a Modpack for the Novice Mages to explore the big world of Modpacks, but also for the experienced All The Mods players, who want a pause from exploding reactors and running out of energy. Conquer the world of the demons and make powerful riuals with Occultism, grow little plants to powerful Mana generators with Botania, become a battlemage with world-eating mining spells and strong armor with Ars Nouveau and reforge this armor with Apotheosis to make it even better!
Fly around in helicopters from Immersive Aircraft and shoot with the guns from Point Blank!
## Make it better!
Here is a Resourcepack that I can recommend for this pack:
[Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
and the Shaders [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/latest) and BSL, which is already included.
## ⚠ Problems
Unfortunately, Mob Grinding Utils is not allowed in Modrinth, so you have to download it separately from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-grinding-utils/files/5131447) and then add it in your mods folder.
### Planned Features
Quests

Custom Recipes
### Also check out my mod  [Vanilla+ Waiter Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla+-waiter-edition) !
